title: Senior Software Engineer - Manipal Digital Health - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Manipal Digital Health - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
